## Summary

- Describe the user-facing or maintenance change in one or two sentences.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `dotnet build .\csharp\RadiologyPpt.App\RadiologyPpt.App.csproj --configuration Release`
- [ ] Storage migrations/contracts/docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Installer built or not needed

## Risk

- Note any migration, packaging, Radiopaedia fetching, or PowerPoint rendering risk.

## Privacy

- Do not include private PDFs, extracted source images, generated PowerPoints, cache/state folders, or other local user data.
